name: improve-workflow
description: Standing project for all CI/CD, DevOps, and workflow improvements to the AI ecosystem. Tracks every change to _System protocols, templates, and cross-tool working patterns.
deploy: Indirect — copy workflow-diagram.html to 3pmo-hub public/, then push 3pmo-hub to trigger GitHub Actions deploy
active_item: Report Tab: Workflow Diagram (3pmo-hub Status → Workflow tab · master: improve-workflow/03-artifacts/workflow-diagram.html)

name: zTemp
description: Default play area for anything that is not an official project — experiments, throwaway scripts, scratch docs, exploratory work.
active_item: Active item: microsoft-email-switch — COMPLETED. Teams web and desktop switched to wajlevy@gmail.com. Yahoo account dormant. P3 open item: decide Option A vs B for yahoo account closure.

name: 3pmo-hub
description: Personal productivity hub — single deployed web app consolidating all AI project tooling into one place. Serves as parent codebase for all tab sub-projects.

name: hol-home
description: Automated agentic real estate tracking pipeline for tourist-licensed (HUTG) properties in Llafranc, Begur, and Calella de Palafrugell (Girona, Spain).

name: improve-brand
description: Provides a brand-specific improvements project to ensure all _system workflow files are appropriately updated as and when the brand is improved.

name: legacy
description: Portfolio Intelligence curriculum and thought leadership content creation. Docs-only project hosted on 3pmo.com.

name: m4p-model
description: Standalone docs and code project to produce an executive capability model representing the integrated ecosystem of SPM, PPM, Value Streams, and Agile-at-Scale execution.

name: system-cleanup
description: Multi-phase cleanup of Windows PC environment — removing legacy storage, migrating to Google Drive, reclaiming disk space, and consolidating Drive root.

name: uae-director
description: Strategic career project to secure a Director-level role in UAE Tier-1 Financial Services or SWF by September 2026.

name: cost-tracker
description: Track and display AI token usage and associated costs across Claude and Gemini, including API integration, real-time gauges, and usage history.

name: issue-tracker
description: Centralised tab within 3pmo-hub that replaces per-project BACKLOG.md files with a live Firestore-backed database.

name: pairwise
description: Web application for pairwise analysis, integrated as a new tab on 3pmo-hub.

name: status
description: Status dashboard tab for 3pmo-hub providing an at-a-glance view of all projects, performance trends, and AI token usage constraints.

name: thought
description: Tab within 3pmo-hub that provides functionality to capture, edit, and visualise thoughts for prioritisation.
